runTitle: v8.11.59 Vercel Playwright DISK Threshold Fresh Slot Recheck

openExpertGaps.next: Add/fix deterministic metric grounding or final answer threshold validation for async job responses.

checks.name: 70% threshold regression query
checks.expected: No DISK >= 70% servers for fresh slot 89.
checks.actual: DISK 사용률 70% 이상 서버 0대. 기준: 전체 18대 중 DISK >= 70%.

job.footer: Cloud Run AI · 서버 실시간 데이터 분석 · 심층 분석 요청됨

checks.name: 65% positive threshold ranking probe
checks.expected: Include db-mysql-dc1-backup 69% and db-mysql-dc1-primary 65%; exclude storage-nfs-dc1-02 60%.
checks.actual: DISK 사용률 65% 이상 서버 2대: db-mysql-dc1-backup 69%, db-mysql-dc1-primary 65%.

job.footer: Cloud Run AI · 일반 대화 응답 · 심층 분석 요청됨

observations.title: Positive threshold answer footer metadata can still show general response
observations.details: The 65% positive threshold answer was numerically correct and used live dashboard data, but its footer displayed '일반 대화 응답' instead of '서버 실시간 데이터 분석'. This is a non-blocking metadata display drift, not a grounding failure.

observations.title: Stale dashboard slot can create false mismatch if the page is reused across a 10-minute boundary
observations.details: Before reloading, the browser showed clock 14:50 with dashboard slot 14:40. A fresh navigation updated the dashboard to slot 89. Future QA should reload production before comparing UI card values to AI answers.
